svg.text: Managed File Transfer on Boomi — tiered solution architecture (consumers → cloud → runtime → systems)
Boomi iPaaS · SaaS control plane · includes MFT (cloud)
Boomi internal runtime · trusted zone · HA · includes the config-driven MFT engine
Applied by config: PGP · TAR (de)archive · validate · rename · route · post-action
no native path to source MFT
